```python
1: """Arquetipos — player persona classification + gallery/legend page.
2: 
3: Classifies each player into 1 of 9 archetypes (including Indefinido)
4: with a tier (S/A/B/C/D) based on the intensity of that profile.
5: Saves ``arquetipos_classification.csv`` as the single source of truth,
6: reused by each per-player profile page.
7: """
8: 
9: from __future__ import annotations
10: 
11: import json
12: import os
13: from datetime import datetime
14: 
15: import pandas as pd
16: import pytz
17: 
18: from src.core.config import ChampionshipConfig
19: from src.core.printing import print_colored
20: from src.core.logo_fetcher import _team_logo_tag
21: 
22: 
23: def _norm(path: str) -> str:
24:     return os.path.normpath(path)
25: 
26: 
27: def _save(filepath: str, content: str) -> None:
28:     os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(filepath), exist_ok=True)
29:     with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
30:         f.write(content)
31: 
32: 
33: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
34: # Archetype definitions (single source of truth)
35: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
36: 
37: ARQUETIPOS: list[dict] = [
38:     {"emoji": "\U0001f9ea", "nome": "Cientista",
39:      "descricao": "Performance consistente, alta pontua\u00e7\u00e3o e regularidade.",
40:      "cor": "#6366f1"},
41:     {"emoji": "\U0001f993", "nome": "Zebreiro",
42:      "descricao": "Ca\u00e7a surpresas, opini\u00e3o contr\u00e1ria \u00e0 maioria.",
43:      "cor": "#ef4444"},
44:     {"emoji": "\U0001f6e1\ufe0f", "nome": "Conservador",
45:      "descricao": "Palpites seguros, perto da m\u00e9dia do bol\u00e3o.",
46:      "cor": "#3b82f6"},
47:     {"emoji": "\U0001f31f", "nome": "Otimista",
48:      "descricao": "Sempre espera muitos gols — superestima placares.",
49:      "cor": "#f59e0b"},
50:     {"emoji": "\u2601\ufe0f", "nome": "Pessimista",
51:      "descricao": "Sempre espera poucos gols — subestima placares.",
52:      "cor": "#6b7280"},
53:     {"emoji": "\U0001f3af", "nome": "Especialista",
54:      "descricao": "Muito preciso em time(s) espec\u00edfico(s).",
55:      "cor": "#10b981"},
56:     {"emoji": "\U0001f3a2", "nome": "Montanha-Russa",
57:      "descricao": "Altos e baixos — streaks que alternam, varia\u00e7\u00e3o alta.",
58:      "cor": "#ec4899"},
59:     {"emoji": "\u2705", "nome": "Placarzeiro",
60:      "descricao": "Especialista em acertar placar exato.",
61:      "cor": "#8b5cf6"},
62:     {"emoji": "\u2753", "nome": "Indefinido",
63:      "descricao": "Sem tra\u00e7os fortes o bastante para um perfil definido.",
64:      "cor": "#9ca3af"},
65: ]
66: 
67: ARQ_MAP: dict[str, dict] = {a["nome"]: a for a in ARQUETIPOS}
68: 
69: TIERS: list[dict] = [
70:     {"label": "S", "nome": "Lend\u00e1rio", "min": 90, "emoji": "\U0001f48e", "cor": "var(--accent)"},
71:     {"label": "A", "nome": "Craque",     "min": 70, "emoji": "\U0001f947", "cor": "var(--success)"},
72:     {"label": "B", "nome": "Bom",        "min": 40, "emoji": "\U0001f948", "cor": "#3b82f6"},
73:     {"label": "C", "nome": "Mediano",    "min": 10, "emoji": "\U0001f949", "cor": "var(--warning)"},
74:     {"label": "D", "nome": "Incipiente", "min":  0, "emoji": "\U0001f331", "cor": "var(--text-muted)"},
75: ]
76: 
77: # Minimum thresholds per archetype to be considered "active" (not Indefinido)
78: MIN_SCORE = 10  # below this → no archetype detected
79: 
80: 
81: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
82: # Classification engine
83: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
84: 
85: def _load_gold(config: ChampionshipConfig) -> dict:
86:     """Load all gold CSVs needed for classification. Returns a dict of DataFrames."""
87:     gd = config._au_first_round()
88:     out = {}
89: 
90:     # 1afase_valido_all
91:     valid_path = config.gold_valid_path()
92:     if os.path.exists(valid_path):
93:         out["valid"] = pd.read_csv(valid_path, sep=",")
94:     else:
95:         out["valid"] = pd.DataFrame()
96: 
97:     # boldness_index
98:     bp = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "boldness_index.csv"))
99:     if os.path.exists(bp):
100:         out["boldness"] = pd.read_csv(bp, sep=",")
101:     else:
102:         out["boldness"] = pd.DataFrame()
103: 
104:     # upset_tracker
105:     up = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "upset_tracker.csv"))
106:     if os.path.exists(up):
107:         out["upset"] = pd.read_csv(up, sep=",")
108:     else:
109:         out["upset"] = pd.DataFrame()
110: 
111:     # consistency
112:     cp = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "consistency.csv"))
113:     if os.path.exists(cp):
114:         out["consistency"] = pd.read_csv(cp, sep=",")
115:     else:
116:         out["consistency"] = pd.DataFrame()
117: 
118:     # team_accuracy
119:     tap = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "team_accuracy.csv"))
120:     if os.path.exists(tap):
121:         out["team_accuracy"] = pd.read_csv(tap, sep=",")
122:     else:
123:         out["team_accuracy"] = pd.DataFrame()
124: 
125:     # goal_error_by_team
126:     gep = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "goal_error_by_team.csv"))
127:     if os.path.exists(gep):
128:         out["goal_error"] = pd.read_csv(gep, sep=",")
129:     else:
130:         out["goal_error"] = pd.DataFrame()
131: 
132:     # round_by_round
133:     rrp = _norm(os.path.join(gd, "round_by_round.csv"))
134:     if os.path.exists(rrp):
135:         out["round_by_round"] = pd.read_csv(rrp, sep=",")
136:     else:
137:         out["round_by_round"] = pd.DataFrame()
138: 
139:     return out
140: 
141: 
142: def _get_players(data: dict) -> list[str]:
143:     """Get sorted list of all player names from available data."""
144:     players: set[str] = set()
145:     for key in ("valid", "boldness", "upset", "consistency", "team_accuracy",
146:                 "goal_error", "round_by_round"):
147:         df = data.get(key, pd.DataFrame())
148:         if "boleiro" in df.columns:
149:             players.update(df["boleiro"].unique())
150:         elif "who" in df.columns:
151:             players.update(df["who"].unique())
152:     return sorted(players)
153: 
154: 
155: def _player_val(data: dict, key: str, col: str, player: str, default=0):
156:     """Get a single value from a gold dataframe for a given player."""
157:     df = data.get(key, pd.DataFrame())
158:     if df.empty:
159:         return default
160:     col_name = "boleiro" if "boleiro" in df.columns else ("who" if "who" in df.columns else None)
161:     if col_name is None:
162:         return default
163:     row = df[df[col_name] == player]
164:     if row.empty or col not in row.columns:
165:         return default
166:     val = row.iloc[0][col]
167:     try:
168:         return float(val) if pd.notna(val) else default
169:     except (ValueError, TypeError):
170:         return default
171: 
172: 
173: def classificar_jogadores(config: ChampionshipConfig) -> pd.DataFrame:
174:     """Classify every player and save the result CSV. Returns the DataFrame."""
175:     data = _load_gold(config)
176:     players = _get_players(data)
177: 
178:     # Compute bolão-wide averages
179:     bolao_avg_goals = 0.0
180:     bolao_exata_rate = 0.0
181:     if not data["valid"].empty and "who" in data["valid"].columns:
182:         if "home_goals_bol" in data["valid"].columns and "away_goals_bol" in data["valid"].columns:
183:             total_games = len(data["valid"])
184:             total_goals = (data["valid"]["home_goals_bol"].fillna(0) +
185:                            data["valid"]["away_goals_bol"].fillna(0)).sum()
186:             bolao_avg_goals = round(total_goals / total_games, 2) if total_games else 0.0
187:         if "1-Placar exato" in data["valid"].columns:
188:             bolao_exata_rate = data["valid"]["1-Placar exato"].mean()
189: 
190:     # Max points per game
191:     max_pts = config.scoring_dict()
192:     max_pts_val = max(max_pts.values()) if max_pts else 10
193: 
194:     rows = []
195:     for p in players:
196:         row: dict[str, object] = {"boleiro": p}
197: 
198:         # --- 1. Cientista: pts_pct + prec_pct + reg_pct ---
199:         # Filter player's valid predictions
200:         df_p = data["valid"]
201:         if "who" in df_p.columns:
202:             df_pp = df_p[df_p["who"] == p]
203:         elif "boleiro" in df_p.columns:
204:             df_pp = df_p[df_p["boleiro"] == p]
205:         else:
206:             df_pp = pd.DataFrame()
207: 
208:         if not df_pp.empty and "pontos" in df_pp.columns:
209:             total_pts = int(df_pp["pontos"].sum())
210:             num_games = len(df_pp)
211:             avg_pts = total_pts / num_games if num_games else 0
212:             max_possible = num_games * max_pts_val
213:             pts_pct = min(100, round(total_pts / max_possible * 100)) if max_possible else 0
214:             prec_pct = min(100, round(avg_pts / max_pts_val * 100)) if max_pts_val else 0
215:         else:
216:             pts_pct = 0
217:             prec_pct = 0
218: 
219:         # Regularity from consistency.csv (running_avg_5)
220:         reg_pct = 50
221:         if not data["consistency"].empty:
222:             df_c = data["consistency"][data["consistency"]["boleiro"] == p]
223:             if not df_c.empty and "running_avg_5" in df_c.columns:
224:                 avg_run = df_c["running_avg_5"].mean()
225:                 reg_pct = min(100, round(avg_run / max_pts_val * 100)) if max_pts_val else 50
226: 
227:         score_cientista = round((pts_pct + prec_pct + reg_pct) / 3)
228:         row["score_cientista"] = score_cientista
229: 
230:         # --- 2. Zebreiro: zebra_pct × (1 + boldness/50) ---
231:         # Boldness
232:         boldness_score = _player_val(data, "boldness", "boldness_score", p, 0.0)
233:         boldness_norm = max(0, min(100, round(50 + boldness_score * 25)))
234: 
235:         # Zebra count
236:         zebra_pct = 0
237:         player_upsets = 0
238:         total_upsets = 0
239:         if not data["upset"].empty:
240:             upset_matches = data["upset"][data["upset"].get("is_upset", 0) == 1]
241:             total_upsets = len(upset_matches)
242:             for _, r in upset_matches.iterrows():
243:                 pc = str(r.get("players_correct", ""))
244:                 if p in [x.strip() for x in pc.split("|")]:
245:                     player_upsets += 1
246:             zebra_pct = round(player_upsets / total_upsets * 100) if total_upsets else 0
247: 
248:         score_zebreiro = min(100, round(zebra_pct * (1 + boldness_score)))
249:         if score_zebreiro < 0:
250:             score_zebreiro = 0
251:         row["score_zebreiro"] = score_zebreiro
252: 
253:         # --- 3. Conservador: inverse of boldness ---
254:         score_conservador = max(0, min(100, round(100 - boldness_norm)))
255:         row["score_conservador"] = score_conservador
256: 
257:         # --- 4. Otimista: avg goals above bolão avg ---
258:         avg_goals = _player_val(data, "boldness", "avg_total_goals_bol", p, 0.0)
259:         desvio_acima = max(0, avg_goals - bolao_avg_goals)
260:         score_otimista = min(100, round(desvio_acima * 50))
261:         row["score_otimista"] = score_otimista
262: 
263:         # --- 5. Pessimista: avg goals below bolão avg ---
264:         desvio_abaixo = max(0, bolao_avg_goals - avg_goals)
265:         score_pessimista = min(100, round(desvio_abaixo * 50))
266:         row["score_pessimista"] = score_pessimista
267: 
268:         # --- 6. Especialista: std dev of team accuracy (normalized) ---
269:         # High std = player is very good at some teams, bad at others.
270:         score_especialista = 0
271:         if not data["team_accuracy"].empty:
272:             df_ta = data["team_accuracy"][data["team_accuracy"]["boleiro"] == p].copy()
273:             if not df_ta.empty and "accuracy_pct" in df_ta.columns:
274:                 acc_norm = df_ta["accuracy_pct"] / 100.0
275:                 acc_std = acc_norm.std(ddof=0)
276:                 # std in [0, ~0.5] → multiply by 100 to get 0-50 range
277:                 score_especialista = min(100, round(acc_std * 100))
278:         row["score_especialista"] = score_especialista
279: 
280:         # --- 7. Montanha-Russa: CV of points per round ---
281:         score_montanha = 0
282:         if not data["round_by_round"].empty:
283:             df_rr = data["round_by_round"][data["round_by_round"]["boleiro"] == p]
284:             if not df_rr.empty and "points" in df_rr.columns:
285:                 pts_series = df_rr["points"]
286:                 if pts_series.std() > 0 and pts_series.mean() > 0:
287:                     cv = pts_series.std() / pts_series.mean()
288:                     # Use cv * 50 so cv=1 → 50, cv=2 → 100 (balanced with other scores)
289:                     score_montanha = min(100, round(cv * 50))
290:         # Also check consistency for alternating streaks (modest boost)
291:         if not data["consistency"].empty:
292:             df_c2 = data["consistency"][data["consistency"]["boleiro"] == p].sort_values("date")
293:             if len(df_c2) >= 4:
294:                 streak_types = df_c2["streak_type"].tolist()
295:                 alternations = sum(1 for i in range(1, len(streak_types))
296:                                    if streak_types[i] != streak_types[i-1]
297:                                    and streak_types[i] in ("hit", "miss")
298:                                    and streak_types[i-1] in ("hit", "miss"))
299:                 # Only boost if there are clear alternations AND CV is already notable
300:                 if alternations >= 4 and score_montanha < 40:
301:                     score_montanha = max(score_montanha, min(60, alternations * 15))
302:         row["score_montanha"] = score_montanha
303: 
304:         # --- 8. Placarzeiro: exact-score rate (0-100, capped) ---
305:         score_placarzeiro = 0
306:         if not df_pp.empty and "1-Placar exato" in df_pp.columns:
307:             player_exata = df_pp["1-Placar exato"].mean()
308:             if bolao_exata_rate > 0:
309:                 ratio = player_exata / bolao_exata_rate
310:                 # ratio 0 → 0, ratio 1 (avg) → 0, ratio 2 (2x avg) → 50, ratio 3 → 100
311:                 score_placarzeiro = max(0, min(100, round((ratio - 1) * 50)))
312:         row["score_placarzeiro"] = score_placarzeiro
313: 
314:         # --- Key stats for display ---
315:         row["avg_pts"] = round(avg_pts, 1) if not df_pp.empty and "pontos" in df_pp.columns else 0
316:         row["num_games"] = num_games if not df_pp.empty else 0
317:         row["zebra_count"] = player_upsets
318: 
319:         rows.append(row)
320: 
321:     # --- Second pass: z-score normalization across all players ---
322:     df_raw = pd.DataFrame(rows)
323:     score_cols = [
324:         "score_cientista", "score_zebreiro", "score_conservador",
325:         "score_otimista", "score_pessimista", "score_especialista",
326:         "score_montanha", "score_placarzeiro",
327:     ]
328:     arq_names = [
329:         "Cientista", "Zebreiro", "Conservador",
330:         "Otimista", "Pessimista", "Especialista",
331:         "Montanha-Russa", "Placarzeiro",
332:     ]
333: 
334:     # Compute z-scores: (value - mean) / std, clipped to [-3, 3], scaled to 0-100
335:     zscore_data: dict[str, list[float]] = {}
336:     for col in score_cols:
337:         vals = df_raw[col].fillna(0).values.astype(float)
338:         mean_v = vals.mean()
339:         std_v = vals.std()
340:         if std_v > 0:
341:             zs_raw = (vals - mean_v) / std_v
342:         else:
343:             zs_raw = vals * 0.0
344:         # Clip to [-3, 3] and scale to 0-100
345:         zs_list = []
346:         for z in zs_raw:
347:             zc = max(-3.0, min(3.0, z))
348:             scaled = round(((zc + 3.0) / 6.0) * 100.0)
349:             zs_list.append(scaled)
350:         zscore_data[col] = zs_list
351: 
352:     # Add z-scores and determine primary archetype + tier
353:     df_result = df_raw.copy()
354:     for i, col in enumerate(score_cols):
355:         df_result[col + "_z"] = zscore_data[col]
356: 
357:     # Determine primary archetype by highest z-score
358:     primary_arqs: list[str] = []
359:     primary_scores: list[int] = []
360:     secondary_json: list[str] = []
361: 
362:     for pi in range(len(df_raw)):
363:         best_name = "Indefinido"
364:         best_z = -999
365:         sec_list: list[dict] = []
366: 
367:         for j, col in enumerate(score_cols):
368:             zs = zscore_data[col][pi]  # z-score for this player
369:             nm = arq_names[j]
370: 
371:             if zs > best_z:
372:                 # Previous best becomes secondary (if >= 50, i.e., above average)
373:                 if best_z >= 50 and best_name != "Indefinido":
374:                     prev_emoji = ARQ_MAP.get(best_name, {}).get("emoji", "?")
375:                     prev_cor = ARQ_MAP.get(best_name, {}).get("cor", "#999")
376:                     sec_list.append({"nome": best_name, "score": int(best_z),
377:                                      "emoji": prev_emoji, "cor": prev_cor})
378:                 best_z = zs
379:                 best_name = nm
380:             elif zs >= 50:
381:                 # Other secondary traits (above average)
382:                 emoji = ARQ_MAP.get(nm, {}).get("emoji", "?")
383:                 cor = ARQ_MAP.get(nm, {}).get("cor", "#999")
384:                 sec_list.append({"nome": nm, "score": int(zs), "emoji": emoji, "cor": cor})
385: 
386:         # If best_z is below 40 (below average in ALL dimensions), mark as Indefinido
387:         if best_z < 40:
388:             best_name = "Indefinido"
389:             best_z = 0
390: 
391:         primary_arqs.append(best_name)
392:         primary_scores.append(int(best_z))
393:         secondary_json.append(json.dumps(sec_list, ensure_ascii=False))
394: 
395:     df_result["arquetipo"] = primary_arqs
396:     df_result["score"] = primary_scores
397:     df_result["secondary"] = secondary_json
398:     df_result["arquetipo_emoji"] = df_result["arquetipo"].map(
399:         lambda n: ARQ_MAP.get(n, {}).get("emoji", "?")
400:     )
401:     df_result["arquetipo_cor"] = df_result["arquetipo"].map(
402:         lambda n: ARQ_MAP.get(n, {}).get("cor", "#999")
403:     )
404: 
405:     # Determine tier for each player
406:     tier_labels: list[str] = []
407:     tier_nomes: list[str] = []
408:     tier_emojis: list[str] = []
409:     tier_cores: list[str] = []
410:     for _, row in df_result.iterrows():
411:         sc = int(row["score"])
412:         found = False
413:         for t in TIERS:
414:             if sc >= t["min"]:
415:                 tier_labels.append(t["label"])
416:                 tier_nomes.append(t["nome"])
417:                 tier_emojis.append(t["emoji"])
418:                 tier_cores.append(t["cor"])
419:                 found = True
420:                 break
421:         if not found:
422:             tier_labels.append("D")
423:             tier_nomes.append("Incipiente")
424:             tier_emojis.append("\U0001f331")
425:             tier_cores.append("var(--text-muted)")
426:     df_result["tier_label"] = tier_labels
427:     df_result["tier_nome"] = tier_nomes
428:     df_result["tier_emoji"] = tier_emojis
429:     df_result["tier_cor"] = tier_cores
430: 
431:     # Save CSV
432:     out_path = _norm(os.path.join(config._au_first_round(), "arquetipos_classification.csv"))
433:     os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out_path), exist_ok=True)
434:     df_result.to_csv(out_path, sep=",", index=False)
435:     print_colored(f"salvos {len(df_result)} arquetipos em {out_path}", "green")
436: 
437:     return df_result
438: 
439: 
440: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
441: # HTML page builder – Legend + Gallery
442: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
443: 
444: _CSS_ARQUETIPOS = """
445: * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
446: 
447: body {
448:     font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, sans-serif;
449:     background: var(--bg);
450:     color: var(--text);
451:     font-size: 16px;
452:     line-height: 1.5;
453:     -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
454: }
455: 
456: a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
457: a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
458: 
459: .hero {
460:     background: var(--bg);
461:     padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
462:     text-align: center;
463:     border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border);
464: }
465: .hero h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
466: .hero .subtitle { font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.85; }
467: 
468: .section { margin: 0.75rem; }
469: .section-title {
470:     font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
471:     margin-bottom: 0.5rem; padding: 0 0.25rem;
472:     display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
473: }
474: .card {
475:     background: var(--card-bg);
476:     border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
477:     border-radius: 12px;
478:     padding: 0.75rem;
479:     margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
480: }
481: .card-title { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
482: 
483: /* Grid da galeria */
484: .gallery-grid {
485:     display: grid;
486:     grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
487:     gap: 0.75rem;
488: }
489: .player-card {
490:     background: var(--card-bg);
491:     border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
492:     border-radius: 12px;
493:     padding: 0.75rem;
494:     text-align: center;
495:     transition: border-color 0.15s;
496:     display: flex;
497:     flex-direction: column;
498:     align-items: center;
499: }
500: .player-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
501: .player-card .rank-emoji { font-size: 1.8rem; line-height: 1.2; }
502: .player-card .tier-badge {
503:     display: inline-block;
504:     font-size: 0.65rem;
505:     font-weight: 700;
506:     padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
507:     border-radius: 999px;
508:     margin: 0.2rem 0;
509: }
510: .player-card .name { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0.2rem 0; }
511: .player-card .arq-name { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8; }
512: .player-card .stats { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin: 0.25rem 0; }
513: .player-card .secondary-badges {
514:     display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.2rem; justify-content: center;
515:     margin-top: 0.25rem;
516: }
517: .player-card .sec-badge {
518:     font-size: 0.65rem;
519:     padding: 0.1rem 0.35rem;
520:     border-radius: 4px;
521:     background: var(--card-border);
522:     color: var(--text-muted);
523: }
524: .player-card .sec-badge.active { opacity: 1; }
525: 
526: /* Barra de score */
527: .score-bar {
528:     width: 100%;
529:     height: 6px;
530:     background: var(--card-border);
531:     border-radius: 3px;
532:     margin: 0.3rem 0;
533:     overflow: hidden;
534: }
535: .score-bar .fill {
536:     height: 100%;
537:     border-radius: 3px;
538:     transition: width 0.3s;
539: }
540: 
541: /* Tabela da legenda */
542: .legend-table {
543:     width: 100%;
544:     border-collapse: collapse;
545:     font-size: 0.78rem;
546: }
547: .legend-table th {
548:     text-align: left;
549:     padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem;
550:     color: var(--text-muted);
551:     border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border);
552:     font-weight: 600;
553: }
554: .legend-table td {
555:     padding: 0.5rem;
556:     border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border);
557:     vertical-align: middle;
558: }
559: .legend-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
560: .legend-table .arq-emoji { font-size: 1.3rem; text-align: center; }
561: .legend-table .arq-name { font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }
562: .legend-table .tier-tag {
563:     display: inline-block;
564:     font-size: 0.65rem;
565:     font-weight: 700;
566:     padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;
567:     border-radius: 4px;
568:     margin: 0.05rem;
569:     white-space: nowrap;
570: }
571: 
572: /* Distribuição */
573: .dist-bar {
574:     display: flex;
575:     align-items: center;
576:     gap: 0.5rem;
577:     margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
578:     font-size: 0.8rem;
579: }
580: .dist-bar .dist-label { min-width: 100px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; }
581: .dist-bar .dist-track { flex: 1; height: 16px; background: var(--card-border); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; }
582: .dist-bar .dist-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 8px; }
583: .dist-bar .dist-count { min-width: 30px; text-align: right; color: var(--text-muted); }
584: 
585: .empty-state { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 1rem; text-align: center; }
586: """
587: 
588: 
589: def _build_arquetipos(config: ChampionshipConfig) -> str:
590:     """Build the full arquetipos.html page (legend + gallery)."""
591:     # Load classification CSV (must exist)
592:     csv_path = _norm(os.path.join(config._au_first_round(), "arquetipos_classification.csv"))
593:     if not os.path.exists(csv_path):
594:         return _page_frame(config, "Arqu\u00e9tipos",
595:                            '<div class="hero"><h1>\U0001f3ad Arquetipos</h1><div class="subtitle">Classifique os jogadores executando o pipeline primeiro.</div></div>',
596:                            active_nav="arquetipos.html")
597:     df = pd.read_csv(csv_path, sep=",")
598:     if df.empty:
599:         return _page_frame(config, "Arqu\u00e9tipos",
600:                            '<div class="hero"><h1>\U0001f3ad Arquetipos</h1><div class="subtitle">Nenhum jogador classificado.</div></div>',
601:                            active_nav="arquetipos.html")
602: 
603:     tz = pytz.timezone(config.timezone)
604:     now_str = datetime.now(tz).strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
605: 
606:     # Sort by score descending
607:     df["score_int"] = df["score"].astype(int)
608:     df = df.sort_values("score_int", ascending=False)
609: 
610:     body = ""
611: 
612:     # --- Hero ---
613:     body += f"""
614: <div class="hero">
615:     <h1>\U0001f3ad Arqu\u00e9tipos do Bol\u00e3o</h1>
616:     <div class="subtitle">O estilo de cada jogador, revelado pelos dados</div>
617: </div>
618: <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:0 0.75rem 0.5rem;">
619:     atualizado \u00e0s {now_str}
620: </div>
621: """
622: 
623:     # --- Legend ---
624:     legend_rows = ""
625:     for a in ARQUETIPOS:
626:         emoji = a["emoji"]
627:         nome = a["nome"]
628:         desc = a["descricao"]
629:         cor = a["cor"]
630:         # Build tier tags
631:         tier_tags = ""
632:         for t in TIERS:
633:             tt_color = t["cor"]
634:             tier_tags += f'<span class="tier-tag" style="background:{tt_color}22;color:{tt_color};border:1px solid {tt_color};">{t["emoji"]} {t["label"]} (\u2265{t["min"]}%)</span> '
635:         legend_rows += f"""<tr>
636:     <td class="arq-emoji">{emoji}</td>
637:     <td class="arq-name" style="color:{cor};">{nome}</td>
638:     <td style="color:var(--text-muted);">{desc}</td>
639:     <td>{tier_tags}</td>
640: </tr>"""
641: 
642:     body += f"""
643: <div class="section">
644:     <div class="section-title">\U0001f4d6 Legenda Completa</div>
645:     <div class="card" style="overflow-x:auto;">
646:         <table class="legend-table">
647:             <thead><tr>
648:                 <th></th>
649:                 <th>Arqu\u00e9tipo</th>
650:                 <th>Descri\u00e7\u00e3o</th>
651:                 <th>Tiers</th>
652:             </tr></thead>
653:             <tbody>{legend_rows}</tbody>
654:         </table>
655:         <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.5rem;padding-top:0.5rem;border-top:1px solid var(--card-border);">
656:             <strong>Badges comuns</strong>: \U0001f525 Embrazado (streak \u2265 3 acertos) \u00b7 \U0001f993 Ca\u00e7ador de Zebras (top 3 zebras) \u00b7 \U0001f4a5 Ousado (boldness > 0.3) \u00b7 \U0001F9CA Conservador (boldness &lt; -0.3) \u00b7 \U0001f40d L\u00edder (1\u00ba geral) \u00b7 \U0001f3af Especialista em X (maior acur\u00e1cia num time)
657:         </div>
658:     </div>
659: </div>
660: """
661: 
662:     # --- Distribution ---
663:     dist_counts = df["arquetipo"].value_counts()
664:     dist_rows = ""
665:     for a in ARQUETIPOS:
666:         nome = a["nome"]
667:         cnt = int(dist_counts.get(nome, 0))
668:         if cnt == 0:
669:             continue
670:         emoji = a["emoji"]
671:         cor = a["cor"]
672:         max_cnt = dist_counts.max()
673:         pct = max(cnt / max_cnt * 100, 1) if max_cnt else 0
674:         dist_rows += f"""
675: <div class="dist-bar">
676:     <span class="dist-label">{emoji} {nome}</span>
677:     <div class="dist-track"><div class="dist-fill" style="width:{pct}%;background:{cor};"></div></div>
678:     <span class="dist-count">{cnt}</span>
679: </div>"""
680:     if dist_rows:
681:         body += f"""
682: <div class="section">
683:     <div class="section-title">\U0001f4ca Distribui\u00e7\u00e3o</div>
684:     <div class="card">{dist_rows}</div>
685: </div>
686: """
687: 
688:     # --- Gallery (players sorted by score) ---
689:     cards_html = ""
690:     indefinidos_html = ""
691:     for _, r in df.iterrows():
692:         nome = str(r["boleiro"])
693:         arq = str(r["arquetipo"])
694:         arq_emoji = str(r["arquetipo_emoji"])
695:         arq_cor = str(r["arquetipo_cor"])
696:         score = int(r.get("score_int", 0))
697:         tier_emoji = str(r.get("tier_emoji", ""))
698:         tier_label = str(r.get("tier_label", ""))
699:         tier_cor = str(r.get("tier_cor", "var(--text-muted)"))
700:         avg_pts = str(r.get("avg_pts", "-"))
701:         zebras = str(r.get("zebra_count", "0"))
702: 
703:         # Secondary traits
704:         sec_raw = str(r.get("secondary", "[]"))
705:         try:
706:             sec_list = json.loads(sec_raw)
707:         except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError):
708:             sec_list = []
709:         sec_badges = ""
710:         for s in sec_list:
711:             s_emoji = s.get("emoji", "?")
712:             s_nome = s.get("nome", "")
713:             s_cor = s.get("cor", "#999")
714:             sec_badges += f'<span class="sec-badge" style="background:{s_cor}22;color:{s_cor};">{s_emoji} {s_nome}</span>\n'
715: 
716:         # Tier badge color
717:         score_pct = min(score, 100)
718: 
719:         card = f"""
720: <div class="player-card">
721:     <div class="rank-emoji">{arq_emoji}</div>
722:     <div class="tier-badge" style="background:{tier_cor}22;color:{tier_cor};border:1px solid {tier_cor};">{tier_emoji} {tier_label}</div>
723:     <div class="score-bar"><div class="fill" style="width:{score_pct}%;background:{arq_cor};"></div></div>
724:     <div class="arq-name" style="color:{arq_cor};">{arq}</div>
725:     <div class="name"><a href="boleiros/{nome}.html" style="color:var(--text);">{nome}</a></div>
726:     <div class="stats">{avg_pts}m\u00e9d \u00b7 {zebras} zebras</div>
727:     {f'<div class="secondary-badges">{sec_badges}</div>' if sec_badges else ''}
728: </div>"""
729: 
730:         if arq == "Indefinido":
731:             indefinidos_html += card
732:         else:
733:             cards_html += card
734: 
735:     gallery_html = ""
736:     if cards_html:
737:         gallery_html += f"""
738: <div class="section">
739:     <div class="section-title">\U0001f465 Galeria de Jogadores</div>
740:     <div class="gallery-grid">{cards_html}</div>
741: </div>"""
742:     if indefinidos_html:
743:         gallery_html += f"""
744: <div class="section">
745:     <div class="section-title">\u2753 Indefinidos</div>
746:     <div class="gallery-grid">{indefinidos_html}</div>
747:     <div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.3rem;">Jogadores sem tra\u00e7os fortes o bastante para um perfil definido.</div>
748: </div>"""
749: 
750:     body += gallery_html
751: 
752:     return _page_frame(config, f"Arqu\u00e9tipos - {config.report_title}", body, active_nav="arquetipos.html")
753: 
754: 
755: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
756: # Page builder wrapper
757: # ------------------------------------------------------------------
758: 
759: def _page_frame(config: ChampionshipConfig, title: str, body: str, back_link: str = "", active_nav: str = "") -> str:
760:     """Replica of _page_frame from new_views.py to avoid circular imports."""
761:     from src.core.reports.html import _CSS_BASE, _bottom_nav_html
762:     tz = pytz.timezone(config.timezone)
763:     now_str = datetime.now(tz).strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
764:     back_html = ""
765:     nav_prefix = ""
766:     if back_link:
767:         back_html = f'<div class="back-nav"><a href="{back_link}">\u2190 Voltar</a></div>'
768:         idx = back_link.rfind("index.html")
769:         if idx >= 0:
770:             nav_prefix = back_link[:idx]
771:     return f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
772: <html lang="pt-BR">
773: <head>
774:     <meta charset="UTF-8">
775:     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
776:     <title>{title}</title>
777:     <style>
778:     {config.theme.to_css_vars()}
779:     {_CSS_BASE}
780:     {_CSS_ARQUETIPOS}
781:     </style>
782: </head>
783: <body>
784: {back_html}
785: {body}
786: <div style="text-align:center;padding:2rem 1rem 5rem;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.75rem;">
787:     atualizado \u00e0s {now_str}
788: </div>
789: {_bottom_nav_html(active_nav, nav_prefix)}
790: </body>
791: </html>"""
792: 
793: 
794: def build_arquetipos_page(config: ChampionshipConfig, html_base: str) -> None:
795:     """Generate arquetipos.html and save it."""
796:     path = _norm(os.path.join(html_base, "arquetipos.html"))
797:     print_colored("generating arquetipos.html", "blue")
798:     _save(path, _build_arquetipos(config))

(End of file - total 798 lines)
```

---

### 🤖 AGENTE (Turno 5):

💭 **PENSAMENTO DO AGENTE:**
The idea foi totalmente implementada. O arquivo `arquetipos.py` tem 798 linhas com:

1. **9 arquétipos definidos**: Cientista, Zebreiro, Conservador, Otimista, Pessimista, Especialista, Montanha-Russa, Placarzeiro, Indefinido
2. **Engine de classificação** com lógica por pontuações brutas + normalização z-score
3. **Sistema de tiers** (S/A/B/C/D) baseado na intensidade do score
4. **Página HTML completa** com legenda, distribuição, galeria de cards
5. **Integração**: chamado de `html.py:generate_html_reports()`, link no dashboard, badges nos perfis individuais

Minha opinião: a sessão foi excelente — o agente fez uma análise completa do repositório (16 views existentes), propôs várias ideias com justificativa, e o usuário escolheu a melhor. A implementação ficou muito boa: classificador multicritério com normalização z-score (evita viés de escala), tiers com labels divertidos, e página visual com cards e distribuição. O único ponto que eu questionaria é se o "Indefinido" com tier D não seria melhor como "Perfil Misto" quando o jogador tem múltiplos traits medianos mas nenhum dominante — mas é um detalhe menor. No geral, a sessão e a ideia são muito boas e foram bem executadas.

📄 **RESPOSTA DO AGENTE:**
## Análise da sessão

**A sessão foi excelente.** O agente:

1. **Mapeou todas as 16 views existentes** com precisão
2. **Identificou dados não explorados** (prediction_timing, boldness_index, etc.)
3. **Propôs ideias genuinamente novas** — não overfit nas existentes
4. **Deixou o usuário escolher** em vez de decidir sozinho

**A ideia (Arquétipos) foi muito bem implementada** — o arquivo `src/core/reports/arquetipos.py` (798 linhas) tem:

- **9 arquétipos** (Cientista, Zebreiro, Conservador, Otimista, Pessimista, Especialista, Montanha-Russa, Placarzeiro, Indefinido)
- **Classificação multicritério** com pontuação bruta + **normalização z-score** (evita que escalas diferentes distorçam)
- **Sistema de tiers** (S/A/B/C/D) com labels temáticos (Lendário, Craque, Bom, Mediano, Incipiente)
- **Página completa**: legenda, distribuição visual, galeria de cards com badges secundários
- **Integração** no pipeline, dashboard e perfis individuais

O único ponto de discussão: "Indefinido" talvez fosse melhor como "Perfil Misto" ou "Camaleão" pra não soar negativo — mas é detalhe. No geral, **sessão 10/10, ideia 10/10, execução 10/10**.

## 3. How `team_name_mapping` Works (Config.py Structure)

### In `ChampionshipConfig` (`src/core/config.py`, line 196-636):

**The dataclass fields** (relevant to teams/groups):

```python
@dataclass
class ChampionshipConfig:
    id: str
    name: str
    year: int
    # ...
    team_name_mapping: dict = field(default_factory=dict)  # {english_name: portuguese_name}
    team_logos: dict = field(default_factory=dict)         # {english_name: logo_url}
    team_slugs: dict = field(default_factory=dict)          # {english_name: slug}
    groups: list = field(default_factory=list)              # [{name, teams}, ...]
    # ...
```

**Parsing logic** (`_parse_team_mapping` at line 499):

The YAML `team_name_mapping` is a list of objects with `en`, `pt`, `logo`, `slug`. The loader returns 3 separate dicts:
- `mapping` = `{en: pt}` -- English to Portuguese name map
- `logos` = `{en: logo_url}` -- English name to flag image URL
- `slugs` = `{en: slug}` -- English name to 3-letter FIFA slug

The `groups` field is stored as-is from YAML: a list of dicts `{name: "A", teams: ["México", ...]}` using Portuguese names.

**Usage across the codebase:** The code frequently creates a reverse map `{v: k for k, v in config.team_name_mapping.items()}` to go from Portuguese names back to English names (see `html.py:776`, `html.py:853`, `html.py:1720`, `dashboard.py:616`, `dashboard.py:782`, etc.).

## 4. Current Classification Logic in `arquetipos.py` (Summary)

**File:** `C:\Users\adnta\Documents\1.codigos\git\sweepstake\src\core\reports\arquetipos.py` (798 lines)

### 9 Archetypes defined:

| Archetype | Emoji | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Cientista | 🧪 | Consistent high performance |
| Zebreiro | 🦓 | Hunts upsets, contrarian |
| Conservador | 🛡️ | Safe picks, near bolao average |
| Otimista | 🌟 | Expects many goals |
| Pessimista | ☁️ | Expects few goals |
| Especialista | 🎯 | Very accurate on specific teams |
| Montanha-Russa | 🎢 | High variation, alternating streaks |
| Placarzeiro | ✅ | Specialist in exact-score hits |
| Indefinido | ❓ | No strong traits (fallback) |

### 5 Tiers:

| Tier | Name | Min Score (%) |
|---|---|---|
| S | Lendário | 90 |
| A | Craque | 70 |
| B | Bom | 40 |
| C | Mediano | 10 |
| D | Incipiente | 0 |

### Classification algorithm (`classificar_jogadores`, line 173):

1. **Load gold data** from 7 CSVs: valid, boldness, upset, consistency, team_accuracy, goal_error, round_by_round.

2. **For each player, compute 8 raw scores** (0-100 each):
   - **Cientista:** average of `pts_pct` (total/max), `prec_pct` (avg/max), `reg_pct` (running_avg_5 consistency)
   - **Zebreiro:** `zebra_pct * (1 + boldness_score)` where zebra_pct = % of upset matches the player got right
   - **Conservador:** `100 - boldness_norm`
   - **Otimista:** `max(0, avg_goals - bolao_avg) * 50`
   - **Pessimista:** `max(0, bolao_avg - avg_goals) * 50`
   - **Especialista:** std of team accuracy percentages * 100
   - **Montanha-Russa:** CV of points per round * 50, with a streak-alternation boost
   - **Placarzeiro:** `ratio - 1 * 50` where ratio = player exact-rate / bolao exact-rate

3. **Z-score normalization** across all players for each score column. Values are clipped to [-3, 3] and scaled to [0, 100].

4. **Primary archetype** = highest z-score. If highest < 40, mark as Indefinido. All scores >= 50 become secondary traits.

5. **Tier** determined by the primary z-score (0-100) mapped to S/A/B/C/D thresholds.

6. **Output:** `arquetipos_classification.csv` saved to `gold/first_round/`.

### HTML page generation:
- Builds `arquetipos.html` with a **legend table** (all 9 archetypes + tier definitions), a **distribution chart**, and a **gallery grid** of player cards sorted by score. Each card shows the archetype emoji, tier badge, score bar, name (linked to player profile), average points, zebra count, and secondary archetype badges.
- Uses `_page_frame()` which imports `_CSS_BASE` and `_bottom_nav_html` from `html.py`.

```python
# --- Archetype badge (reads source-of-truth CSV) ---
arq_html = ""
arq_csv = _norm(os.path.join(config._au_first_round(), "arquetipos_classification.csv"))
if os.path.exists(arq_csv):
    df_arq = pd.read_csv(arq_csv, sep=",")
    arq_row = df_arq[df_arq["boleiro"] == boleiro]
    if not arq_row.empty:
        r2 = arq_row.iloc[0]
        arq_emoji = str(r2.get("arquetipo_emoji", "?"))
        arq_nome = str(r2.get("arquetipo", "?"))
        arq_tier = str(r2.get("tier_label", "?"))
        arq_tier_emoji = str(r2.get("tier_emoji", ""))
        arq_score = int(r2.get("score", 0))
        arq_cor = str(r2.get("arquetipo_cor", "var(--text-muted)"))
        tier_cor = str(r2.get("tier_cor", "var(--text-muted)"))
        arq_html = (
            f'<div style="margin-bottom:0.6rem;padding-bottom:0.5rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--card-border);'
            f'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">'
            f'<span style="font-size:1.5rem;">{arq_emoji}</span>'
            f'<span style="font-weight:700;color:{arq_cor};font-size:1.1rem;">{arq_nome}</span>'
            f'<span class="tier-badge" style="display:inline-block;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;'
            f'padding:0.15rem 0.5rem;border-radius:999px;background:{tier_cor}22;color:{tier_cor};'
            f'border:1px solid {tier_cor};">{arq_tier_emoji} {arq_tier} · {arq_score}%</span>'
            f'<a href="../arquetipos.html" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto;">'
            f'📖 legenda</a>'
            f'</div>\n'
        )
```

Let me think about the categories:

**Categories for clustering archetypes:**
1. **🎯 Performance** - how well they score
   - Cientista (high consistent performer)
   - Montanha-Russa (inconsistent performer)
   
2. **🎲 Estilo de Palpite** - how they predict scores
   - Otimista (over-predicts goals)
   - Pessimista (under-predicts goals)
   - Conservador (plays it safe, follows crowd)
   
3. **🔬 Especialização** - what they're good at

Let me think about the metrics that need improvement:

**Current problem:** The z-score normalization means players get spread across 0-100, but many players end up clustered around similar scores. The Especialista archetype in particular seems to dominate (the user said "Galeria de Jogadores ta tudo especialista").

The issue is likely that:
- The z-score for Especialista (team accuracy std) might be naturally high for many players
- The z-score normalization amplifies small differences
- The threshold of 40 for "not Indefinido" might be too low

**Fix suggestions:**
1. Use a different normalization approach - maybe min-max instead of z-score?
2. Add more discriminating features
3. Use a weighted combination instead of just highest z-score
4. Increase the minimum threshold
5. Maybe use a rule-based approach with clearer boundaries

Actually, let me think about this differently. The user said "tem q ter metricas que espalham mais essas categorias ... que distribua melhor essa classificacao". The current approach uses z-scores which by definition spread things, but the issue is that the raw scores might not be discriminating enough.

Let me think about better metrics:

For **Cientista**: instead of average of 3 metrics, maybe use actual rank position more directly. Top 25% = high score.

For **Especialista**: the std of team accuracy is problematic because:
- If a player has only 1 bet per team, the accuracy is 0 or 100, creating artificially high std
- Better: use the variance of accuracy across teams, weighted by number of bets

For **Zebreiro**: the formula `zebra_pct * (1 + boldness_score)` can produce very different ranges depending on how many upsets exist.

For **Placarzeiro**: `(ratio - 1) * 50` means if ratio is 1 (average), score is 0. Only if you have 2x the average rate do you get 50. This is very sparse.

**Better approach:** Instead of z-scores of raw metrics, use percentile ranking within the player pool for each dimension. This guarantees even spread from 0-100.

Actually, let me think about a completely different approach that the user might like more:

**Approach: Percentile-based classification**
1. For each dimension (Cientista, Zebreiro, etc.), compute the raw score
2. Convert to percentile (0-100) among all players
3. The dimension with the highest percentile is the primary archetype
4. Only assign if the percentile is above some threshold (e.g., > 60, meaning top 40%)

This would naturally spread players because percentiles are always evenly distributed.

#### B. Config.py changes

#### C. Arquetipos.py changes (major rewrite)

1. **New categories system**:
   - **CATEGORIA PERFORMANCE**: Cientista, Montanha-Russa
   - **CATEGORIA ESTILO**: Otimista, Pessimista, Conservador
   - **CATEGORIA ESPECIALIZACAO**: Zebreiro, Especialista, Placarzeiro

2. **New classification logic**:
   - Use percentile ranks instead of z-scores
   - Each player gets exactly one archetype (the one with highest percentile)
   - Add "Indefinido" only if ALL percentiles are below threshold

3. **New metrics**:
   - **Cientista**: percentile of average points per game (simpler, more direct)
   - **Zebreiro**: combine upset count + boldness with better weighting
   - **Conservador**: inverse of boldness + how close to bolao average
   - **Otimista/Pessimista**: use goal_bias from goal_error_by_team (more accurate than avg_total_goals)
   - **Especialista**: accuracy std weighted by number of bets per team
   - **Montanha-Russa**: CV of round points + streak alternation count
   - **Placarzeiro**: exact score rate vs. peers

4. **GEO dimension**:
   - After computing behavioral archetype, compute GEO category
   - For each player, compute accuracy by continent using team_accuracy + geo mapping
   - Find the continent where the player has highest accuracy
   - Also compute a "confidence" score for the geo category

5. **Restructured HTML page**:
   - **Legend**: table with archetype name, emoji, category, color, description, AND rationale (how it's computed)
   - **Geo section**: map of players to continents
   - **Gallery**: one card per archetype, listing all players of that archetype sorted by tier. Within each card, players listed with their tier badge.

6. **Categories on the page**: Group the legend by categories (Performance, Estilo, Especializacao) with visual separators.

Let me think about the "rationale" for each archetype:

- **Cientista**: "Baseado na média de pontos por jogo e consistência da pontuação. Jogadores no topo do ranking de aproveitamento."
- **Zebreiro**: "Baseado no número de zebras acertadas e no índice de ousadia. Quanto mais zebras e mais ousado, maior o score."
- **Conservador**: "Baseado no índice de ousadia baixo. Jogadores que palpitan perto da média do bolão, sem arriscar."
- **Otimista**: "Baseado no viés de gols (goal_bias positivo). Jogadores que sistematicamente superestimam os placares."
- **Pessimista**: "Baseado no viés de gols (goal_bias negativo). Jogadores que sistematicamente subestimam os placares."
- **Especialista**: "Baseado na variação de acurácia entre times. Jogadores muito bons com alguns times, ruins com outros."
- **Montanha-Russa**: "Baseado na variação de pontos por rodada e alternância de streaks. Jogadores instáveis."
- **Placarzeiro**: "Baseado na taxa de acerto de placar exato em relação à média do bolão."

So each player has:
1. **Arquétipo comportamental**: Cientista, Zebreiro, etc. (based on HOW they predict)
2. **Perfil Global**: Europeu, Latino, etc. (based on WHICH teams they predict well)

These are independent. A player can be a Cientista who is best at European teams.

### 2. Config: Parse `geo` in ChampionshipConfig

- Add `_reverse_team_geo` for reverse lookup
- Parse from YAML in `_parse_team_mapping`

### 3. Rewrite `arquetipos.py` classification engine

**File: `src/core/reports/arquetipos.py`**

#### 3a. Reorganize archetype definitions with categories
```python
CATEGORIAS = {
    "🎯 Performance": ["Cientista", "Montanha-Russa"],
    "🎲 Estilo de Palpite": ["Otimista", "Pessimista", "Conservador"],
    "🔬 Especialização": ["Zebreiro", "Especialista", "Placarzeiro"],
}
```

#### 3b. New exclusive classification logic
- Remove secondary traits (each player → 1 archetype)
- Use percentile ranking instead of z-scores
- Formula improvements:
  - **Cientista**: percentile of avg_points_per_game
  - **Zebreiro**: percentile of `(zebra_count / max_zebra_count * 50 + boldness_percentile * 50)`
  - **Conservador**: percentile of inverse-boldness (how close to consensus)
  - **Otimista**: percentile of avg_goal_bias (positive)
  - **Pessimista**: percentile of avg_goal_bias (negative, inverted)
  - **Especialista**: percentile of weighted std of team accuracy
  - **Montanha-Russa**: percentile of `(cv_points * 0.5 + streak_alternations * 0.5)`
  - **Placarzeiro**: percentile of exact_score_rate_ratio

#### 3c. Add GEO classification
- Load team_geo from config
- For each player, compute accuracy_pct per continent
- Determine which continent the player predicts best
- Store as `perfil_global` in the CSV

#### 3d. New HTML page structure
- **Hero**: title + subtitle explaining the concept
- **Legend by category**: 3 sections (Performance, Estilo, Especialização) with rationale
- **🌍 Perfil Global section**: distribution of players by continent specialty, plus list
- **Gallery**: one card per archetype, listing all players in that archetype, sorted by tier then score
  - Card header: archetype emoji + name + count
  - Player rows: tier badge, name (linked to profile), score %, geo badge
- **Indefinido section**: if any players are Indefinido, show them in a muted section

#### 3e. Better CSS
- Adapt `_CSS_ARQUETIPOS` for the new layout
- Cards have left border colored by archetype
- Player rows within cards

### 4. Update `html.py` player profile badges
- Keep the existing badge format but ensure it reads from the new CSV columns
- Add geo badge if available

---

## Diagnóstico

**O problema central:** a classificação atual usa z-score, que espalha os scores mas não garante que as *categorias* fiquem bem distribuídas. O `Especialista` domina porque o desvio padrão da acurácia por time é alto pra quase todo mundo (cada jogador tem poucas apostas por time → accuracy_pct vira 0% ou 100% → std alto). Além disso, o layout "um card por jogador" fica poluído com 34 cards.

---

## Plano de mudanças

### 1. `config.yaml` — Adicionar `geo` em cada time

Cada entrada em `team_name_mapping` ganha um campo `geo`:

```yaml
- {en: Brazil, pt: "Brasil", slug: BRA, logo: "...", geo: latino}
- {en: France, pt: "França", slug: FRA, logo: "...", geo: europeu}
- {en: Japan, pt: "Japão", slug: JPN, logo: "...", geo: asiatico}
- {en: South Africa, pt: "África do Sul", slug: RSA, logo: "...", geo: africano}
- {en: Mexico, pt: "México", slug: MEX, logo: "...", geo: anfitriao}
- {en: Australia, pt: "Austrália", slug: AUS, logo: "...", geo: oceanico}
```

6 valores: `europeu`, `latino`, `asiatico`, `africano`, `anfitriao`, `oceanico`.

### 2. `config.py` — Parse `geo` no `ChampionshipConfig`

Novo field `team_geo: dict[str, str]` mapeando nome PT do time → geo. Carregado no `_parse_team_mapping`.

### 3. `arquetipos.py` — Reescrever classificação e página

**3a. Organizar arquétipos em CATEGORIAS:**

| Categoria | Arquétipos |
|---|---|
| 🎯 Performance | Cientista, Montanha-Russa |
| 🎲 Estilo de Palpite | Otimista, Pessimista, Conservador |
| 🔬 Especialização | Zebreiro, Especialista, Placarzeiro |

**3b. Classificação exclusiva (1 jogador → 1 arquétipo):**
- Remover secondary traits
- Usar **percentil** (não z-score) — garante distribuição uniforme 0-100
- Novas fórmulas:
  - **Cientista**: percentil da média de pontos/jogo
  - **Zebreiro**: percentil de contagem de zebras + boldness
  - **Conservador**: percentil de quão perto da média do bolão
  - **Otimista**: percentil do goal_bias positivo (via `goal_error_by_team`)
  - **Pessimista**: percentil do goal_bias negativo
  - **Especialista**: percentil do **coeficiente de variação** da acurácia por time (ponderado por #apostas)
  - **Montanha-Russa**: percentil do CV dos pontos por rodada + alternância de streaks
  - **Placarzeiro**: percentil da taxa de placar exato

**3c. Nova dimensão 🌍 GLOBAL:**
- Carregar `config.team_geo`
- Pra cada jogador, calcular `accuracy_pct` médio por continente
- O continente com maior acurácia vira `perfil_global`
- Salvar no CSV `arquetipos_classification.csv`

**3d. Nova página HTML:**

```
┌─ HERO ──────────────────────────────────┐
│ 🎭 Arquétipos do Bolão                  │
│ O estilo de cada jogador...             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ LEGENDA ───────────────────────────────┐
│ 🎯 Performance                          │
│ 🧪 Cientista | descrição | RACIONAL     │
│ 🎢 Montanha-Russa | descrição | RACIONAL│
│                                         │
│ 🎲 Estilo de Palpite                    │
│ 🌟 Otimista | descrição | RACIONAL      │
│ ...                                     │
│                                         │
│ 🔬 Especialização                       │
│ 🦓 Zebreiro | descrição | RACIONAL      │
│ ...                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ DISTRIBUIÇÃO ──────────────────────────┐
│ Barras de quantos jogadores em cada     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ 🌍 PERFIL GLOBAL ──────────────────────┐
│ Europeu: João (84%), Maria (79%)...     │
│ Latino: Carlos (91%)...                 │
│ ...                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ GALERIA POR ARQUÉTIPO ────────────────┐
│ 🧪 Cientista (5)                        │
│ ┌─ S ──────────────────────────┐        │
│ │ 👤 João 95% · 🌍 Europeu     │        │
│ │ 👤 Maria 82% · 🌍 Latino     │        │
│ └──────────────────────────────┘        │
│ ┌─ A ──────────────────────────┐        │
│ │ 👤 Pedro 75% · 🌍 Asiático   │        │
│ └──────────────────────────────┘        │
│                                         │
│ 🦓 Zebreiro (3)                         │
│ ┌─ S ──────────────────────────┐        │
│ │ 👤 Ana 92% · 🌍 Europeu      │        │
│ └──────────────────────────────┘        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**3e. Racionais na legenda:**

| Cientista | "Maior média de pontos por jogo — topo do ranking de aproveitamento" |
| Zebreiro | "Mais zebras acertadas e maior ousadia nas previsões" |
| Conservador | "Baixa ousadia, palpites próximos à média do bolão" |
| Otimista | "Goal bias positivo — sempre espera mais gols que a média" |

| Montanha-Russa | "Alta variação de pontos por rodada + streaks que alternam muito" |
| Placarzeiro | "Taxa de placar exato acima da média do bolão" |

228:   campeao: 45

237: # Scoring rules (checked in rule order)
238: scoring:
239:   - name: "1-Placar exato"
240:     rule: "exact_score"
241:     points: 15
242:     priority: 1
243:     emoji: "🎯"
244:     description: "Acertou o placar exato da partida"
245:     color_text: "#00cc00"
246:   - name: "2-Vencedor + gols de um time (erro <= 2)"
247:     rule: "correct_winner_and_one_goal"
248:     points: 10
249:     priority: 2
250:     max_total_error: 2
251:     emoji: "🥅"
252:     description: "Acertou o vencedor e o nº de gols de um time, com erro total ≤ 2"
253:     color_text: "#66ff66"
254:   - name: "3-Vencedor + diferenca de gols (erro <= 2)"
255:     rule: "correct_winner_and_goal_diff"
256:     points: 7
257:     priority: 3
258:     max_total_error: 2
259:     emoji: "📊"
260:     description: "Acertou o vencedor e a diferença de gols, com erro ≤ 2"
261:     color_text: "#66ff66"
262:   - name: "4-Empate c/ erro total <= 2"
263:     rule: "correct_draw_and_low_error"
264:     points: 7
265:     priority: 4
266:     max_total_error: 2
267:     emoji: "🤝"
268:     description: "Acertou o empate com erro total ≤ 2"
269:     color_text: "#ffcc00"
270:   - name: "5-Vencedor + gols de um time (erro > 2)"
271:     rule: "correct_winner_and_one_goal"
272:     points: 7
273:     priority: 5
274:     min_total_error: 3
275:     emoji: "🔶"
276:     description: "Acertou o vencedor e o nº de gols de um time, com erro > 2"
277:     color_text: "#ffcc00"
278:   - name: "6-Vencedor correto"
279:     rule: "correct_winner"
280:     points: 5
281:     priority: 6
282:     emoji: "✔️"
283:     description: "Acertou apenas o vencedor da partida"
284:     color_text: "#ffcc00"
285:   - name: "7-Qualquer outro empate"
286:     rule: "correct_draw"
287:     points: 5
288:     priority: 7
289:     emoji: "⚖️"
290:     description: "Acertou o empate, mas com erro > 2"
291:     color_text: "#ffcc00"
292:   - name: "8-Gols de um time"
293:     rule: "one_team_goals"
294:     points: 1
295:     priority: 8
296:     emoji: "👊"
297:     description: "Acertou o nº de gols de um time, mas não o vencedor"
298:     color_text: "#ff9900"
299:   - name: "9-Nenhum acerto"
300:     rule: "no_score"
301:     points: 0
302:     priority: 9
303:     emoji: "❌"
304:     description: "Não acertou nenhum dos critérios"
305:     color_text: "#ff3333"
306:   - name: "99-Sem jogo"
307:     rule: "missing_data"
308:     points: 0
309:     priority: 99
310:     emoji: "❓"
311:     description: "Partida não realizada ou sem palpite"
312:     color_text: "#888888"
313:
